name: Barrel Energy Inc.
summary: Barrel Energy Inc (Barrel or the Company) was incorporated on January 27, 2014, under the laws of the State of Nevada. The Company was formed to invest in the energy sector. On September 26, 2014, the Company leased the Bison Property, an unproven oil and gas project in the province of Alberta, Canada.
